title: Adventure Time Texture Pack
description: The Most Detailed Adventure Time Texture Pack In Minecraft!
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/TpxHDipl4SQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

This texture pack turns your Minecraft World into the Land of Ooo from Adventure Time!
The goal is to create the most immersive pack possible. It is 99% completed!

 ## **OPTIFINE OR EMF REQUIRED**

Required Fabric Mods:
- CONTINUITY
- ENTITY MODEL FEATURES
- ENTITY TEXTURE FEATURES
- POLYTONE (For Pink Trees*)
- SKYBOXIFY (Recommended For Custom Skies*)


![Patreon Exclusive Textures Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0307ff96971f631318abb96ec173bccf5136df5b.png)

![Patreon Exclusive Pictures! Iron Golem is Banana Guard, Skeleton Horse is Lady Rainicorn, Carved Pumpkin is BMO](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6fece6ee8a908e5412c05f9ffe4b2ae9e2fa261.png)

![CIT models of Marceline's Furniture for Patreons Only](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/718ed90442d5d1fe8c0e7449e2dbeae681f155a2.png)


<details>
<summary>CIT Naming Guide</summary>

**ALL ARE CASE SENSITIVE**

To use place the objects in invisible item frames:

/give @p item_frame[entity_data={id:"minecraft:item_frame",Invisible:1b}] 1


**Red Wool**

"Stool" = Red Stool

"Chair" = Small Red Arm Chair

"Couch" = Red Couch

**Oak Planks**

"﻿Amp1" = Marceline's Wooden Amp

**Stone**

"Amp2" = Marceline's Metal Amp

**Glowstone**

"Lamp" = Small Table and Lamp


</details>




These textures and more, are Patreon exclusive, you can pay for only a month and still have them forever, but stay tuned because more exclusive textures will be released!

## **[Follow me on Patreon Here!](https://www.patreon.com/SquirrelGames)**


![Custom Models Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d896d8d7feeda9d8e4c668d17769b127021b8d04.png)

![Rename Villagers / Spawn Other Mobs For Custom Character Models](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/22aa791f8e626a61e08054643e21ec78d5207146.png)


<details>
<summary>Custom Model Naming Guide</summary>

**Villagers**


No Name = Goblin


"Finn" = Finn


"Princess Bubblegum" = Princess Bublegum


"Marceline" = Both Marceline Variants


"Flame Princess" = Flame Princess


"BMO" = BMO


"LSP" = Lumpy Space Princess


"Huntress Wizard" = Huntress Wizard

"Fionna" = Fionna 

"Lemongrab" = Both Lemongrab Variants

"Peppermint Butler" = Peppermint Butler

"Strawberry" = Chocolate Covered Strawberry Candy Citizen (Also spawn naturally in forest biomes)


"Donut" = Tall Donut Candy Citizen (Also spawn naturally in forest biomes)


"Candy Corn" = Candy Corn Candy Citizen (Also spawn naturally in forest biomes)


**Other Mobs With Models (No Naming Needed)**


Jake The Dog = Woods Wolf


The Ice King and Magic Man = Witch Variants


Cake the Cat = Jellie Cat


Choose Goose = Wandering Trader


Slime Princess = Slime


The Lich = Warden

</details>

![All New 1.21.11 Mobs and Spear](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb43d27c879b9e9c83596eb56fad7482a2f26a98.png)
![Happy Ghast is Ancient Psychic Tandem War Elephant + New Fionna Villager Variant](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/88d7e7859156e8cd31ccdd90396f2deabeea1e92.png)

To ensure immersion, some of the mobs have custom models to make them more accurate to the show! 

I am constantly working on new ways to improve the models, and textures, and always going back through and redoing some older ones to make sure the quality is of a higher standard!

A lot of the colors are picked directly from episodes of the show! Accuracy is the number one priority! You can even search through all the episodes to find the different blocks in the pack!

![Finn's Swords Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/655fedef7550d021ed301938d2240ec4254f1c29.png)

![All of Finn's Swords in the Pack! In order of Material](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19fc1e667db8e66e45614e2b62870a3afe427b7f.png)

Collect Finn's Swords!

**Known Issues**

There is no Optifine Colors mod for 1.21+ yet resulting in no pink trees :(

Optifine previews for 1.21.5+ Do not include Mob Custom Models
